Your personal concierge

Meet Sofia.
She's been
expecting you.

Ask her anything. She'll listen, guide you toward what your skin is ready for, and find a rare opening with exactly the right provider.

Start your consultation → No commitment. Just a conversation.

Sofia
Lumière Concierge
S

Sofia is ready to meet you.
Click "Start your consultation" to begin.

What we offer

Treatments
worth the wait

I
Neuromodulators

Botox, Dysport, and Xeomin administered with surgical precision. Sofia can tell you more about how each one works — your provider will determine what's right for you.

Ask Sofia about this →
II
Dermal Fillers

Hyaluronic acid-based sculpting for volume, contour, and lift. Results that look like you, only more rested. You might want to talk to your provider about which areas are best for you.

Ask Sofia about this →
III
Laser & Light

From IPL to CO₂ resurfacing — targeted energy for texture, tone, and pigment. Sofia can walk you through what each treatment does before you speak with your provider.

Ask Sofia about this →
IV
Body Contouring

Non-surgical body sculpting with clinically proven technology. Your provider will design the right protocol — Sofia can give you a head start on what questions to ask.

Ask Sofia about this →
The experience

From first hello
to your best self

01
Talk to Sofia

She'll ask what's on your mind, what's coming up in your life, and what you want to feel like walking out of Lumière. No forms. No pressure. Just a real conversation.

02
Get matched & booked

Sofia knows our providers' schedules. She'll find a rare opening with the right person for your goals and lock it in — all before you leave the page.

03
Arrive ready

Your intake is done. Your provider has reviewed everything. You walk in and go straight to what matters — feeling extraordinary.

Lumière
Where skin meets science, and science meets beauty.
© 2025 Lumière MedSpa
